debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : isExpert (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

failed_attempts:
cases n with
  | zero => exact Fin.elim0 k
  | succ n => 
    simp only [Nat.succ_sub_one]
    sorry

by_contra hc
  push_neg at hc
  simp only [isExpert, after] at h
  omega

by_contra hc
  push_neg at hc
  have hn : n ≥ 1 := Fin.pos k
  omega

by_contra h_neg
  push_neg at h_neg
  have : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := Fintype.card_fin n
  -- Need to derive contradiction from h and h_neg
  omega

cases n with
  | zero => exact Fin.elim0 k
  | succ n => simp only [Nat.succ_sub_one]; sorry

unfold isExpert after makeCalls at h
  omega

have hn : 0 < n := Fin.pos k
  omega

simp only [isExpert, after] at h
  sorry

by_contra hc
  push_neg at hc
  simp only [isExpert] at h
  have : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := Fintype.card_fin n
  have hS : S.length + 1 ≤ n := by omega
  sorry
